practiceChallenge.title: Fill in the slide rule
practiceChallenge.description: Complete the helper so it describes what leaves and what enters when a fixed-size window slides.
hints: When the window moves right, the leftmost value leaves.
A new value enters on the right.
This lesson uses a fixed-size window.
practiceChallenge.successMessage: Nice work. You rebuilt the fixed-size slide rule correctly.
practiceChallenge.retryMessage: Not yet. Recheck what leaves, what enters, and whether the window stays fixed or changes size.

blanks.label: Which window style this lesson uses

visibleTests.label: Leaving side
visibleTests.scenario: Which side loses a value when the window slides?

visibleTests.label: Entering side
visibleTests.scenario: Which side gains a value when the window slides?

visibleTests.label: Window style
visibleTests.scenario: What kind of window stays size k?
